templates.name: Data sources
templates.description: Data-sources / connector gallery — searchable list of configured connections plus a grid of connector types to add a new source.

templates.name: Execution monitor
templates.description: Execution monitoring dashboard — KPI tiles, search + status filters, and the expandable run log for a workspace.

templates.name: Pipeline detail
templates.description: Pipeline detail screen — app shell with the visual transformation DAG, a selected-dataset panel, and the recent-executions monitor.

templates.name: Query Analyzer
templates.description: SQL exploration screen — schema browser rail, an expression/SQL editor with autocomplete, and a results grid.

templates.name: Source dataset wizard
templates.description: Multi-step wizard to add a source dataset — pick a connector type, a connection, browse the schema, preview columns, then name and confirm.
